creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Sat May 25 05:46:25 2013
New Revision: 319028
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319028

Log:
  - Trim Makefile header
  - Remove unnecessary depend on PERL_LEVEL < 5.12
  
  PR:		ports/178944
  Submitted by:	az
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Plack-Middleware-Expires/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/p5-Plack-Middleware-Expires/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Plack-Middleware-Expires/Makefile	Sat May 25 05:44:34 2013	(r319027)
+++ head/www/p5-Plack-Middleware-Expires/Makefile	Sat May 25 05:46:25 2013	(r319028)
@@ -1,9 +1,5 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Plack-Middleware-Expires
-# Date created:		2011-02-03
-# Whom:			Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
-#
+# Created by: Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	Plack-Middleware-Expires
 PORTVERSION=	0.03
@@ -22,10 +18,4 @@ PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=		Plack::Middleware::Expires.3
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 501001
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-parent>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-parent
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
